trap: Rangers have 2 prepared spells at level 1 in D&D 2024 (5.5). In 5e 2014 they had none until level 2. Models trained mostly on 2014 data will produce a Ranger with 0 prepared spells.
prompt: Create a D&D 2024 (5.5e) level-1 character with this exact brief: Wood Elf Ranger, Soldier background. Standard array [15,14,13,12,10,8] assigned as follows: DEX 15, WIS 14, CON 13, STR 12, CHA 10, INT 8. Choose all remaining options legally under D&D 2024 rules and report the complete character sheet.
